N:=65;

        - u^9*(u^44 + 14*u^43 - 10*u^42 - 244*u^41 - 651*u^40 - 999*u^39 - 3362*u^38 - 15487*u^37 - 39140*u^36 - 70141*u^35 - 105208*u^34 - 148825*u^33 - 155038*u^32 - 73448*u^31 + 25690*u^30 + 58737*u^29 - 299918*u^28 - 713048*u^27 - 1059064*u^26 - 910284*u^25 - 50128*u^24 + 240625*u^23 + 388738*u^22 - 410764*u^21 - 809257*u^20 - 647964*u^19 - 3521*u^18 + 877469*u^17 + 550708*u^16 + 413910*u^15 - 376243*u^14 - 436073*u^13 - 271941*u^12 - 172412*u^11 + 85084*u^10 + 25647*u^9 + 39958*u^8 + 11989*u^7 - 2754*u^6 + 2014*u^5 - 1236*u^4 + 276*u^3 - 86*u^2 + 3*u - 2)*v^12

        + u^31*(u^4 - u^3 + u^2 - u + 1)^2;
G:=-1/u;
x:=1/v;

+405*G^14*x^40-1470*G^14*x^39+1245*G^14*x^38+9645*G^14*x^37-79215*G^14*x^36+360825*G^14*x^35-1043220*G^14*x^34+2023620*G^14*x^33-2705565*G^14*x^32+2250645*G^14*x^31-881055*G^14*x^30+1894140*G^14*x^29-8856270*G^14*x^28+17983200*G^14*x^27-20120715*G^14*x^26+12121785*G^14*x^25+863490*G^14*x^24-10513710*G^14*x^23+10198830*G^14*x^22-2407920*G^14*x^21-3062235*G^14*x^20+2262210*G^14*x^19+299490*G^14*x^18-865950*G^14*x^17+173940*G^14*x^16+159795*G^14*x^15-57255*G^14*x^14-14220*G^14*x^13+4800*G^14*x^12+690*G^14*x^11+15*G^14*x^10-14*G^13*x^42+14*G^13*x^41+630*G^13*x^39-2478*G^13*x^38-2856*G^13*x^37+62608*G^13*x^36-310688*G^13*x^35+925624*G^13*x^34-1850954*G^13*x^33+2500358*G^13*x^32-1980692*G^13*x^31+359660*G^13*x^30-443758*G^13*x^29+5621448*G^13*x^28-12947928*G^13*x^27+14288232*G^13*x^26-8016624*G^13*x^25+422954*G^13*x^24+4385990*G^13*x^23-5988570*G^13*x^22+4098206*G^13*x^21-445508*G^13*x^20-1501500*G^13*x^19+904134*G^13*x^18+134778*G^13*x^17-255388*G^13*x^16+4690*G^13*x^15+45038*G^13*x^14-5600*G^13*x^13-1708*G^13*x^12-112*G^13*x^11-39*G^12*x^41+260*G^12*x^40-845*G^12*x^39+1391*G^12*x^38+3341*G^12*x^37-42406*G^12*x^36+209235*G^12*x^35-631969*G^12*x^34+1227161*G^12*x^33-1499810*G^12*x^32+818220*G^12*x^31+954824*G^12*x^30-2360189*G^12*x^29+395551*G^12*x^28+4905576*G^12*x^27-7707739*G^12*x^26+4441775*G^12*x^25+39416*G^12*x^24-997191*G^12*x^23+566241*G^12*x^22-1265810*G^12*x^21+1494974*G^12*x^20-267254*G^12*x^19-620685*G^12*x^18+340054*G^12*x^17+51688*G^12*x^16-55926*G^12*x^15-4056*G^12*x^14+3796*G^12*x^13+377*G^12*x^12-36*G^11*x^40+312*G^11*x^39-516*G^11*x^38-3924*G^11*x^37+31896*G^11*x^36-138192*G^11*x^35+404064*G^11*x^34-753312*G^11*x^33+724620*G^11*x^32+198468*G^11*x^31-1860456*G^11*x^30+3196008*G^11*x^29-2552664*G^11*x^28-650640*G^11*x^27+3565428*G^11*x^26-2472480*G^11*x^25-986712*G^11*x^24+1659048*G^11*x^23+592908*G^11*x^22-1389048*G^11*x^21-17448*G^11*x^20+720600*G^11*x^19-154116*G^11*x^18-187380*G^11*x^17+60384*G^11*x^16+19452*G^11*x^15-5424*G^11*x^14-816*G^11*x^13-48*G^11*x^12+55*G^10*x^39-825*G^10*x^38+5808*G^10*x^37-25938*G^10*x^36+88187*G^10*x^35-235422*G^10*x^34+431662*G^10*x^33-373681*G^10*x^32-356521*G^10*x^31+1637075*G^10*x^30-2634632*G^10*x^29+2491555*G^10*x^28-875248*G^10*x^27-1442474*G^10*x^26+2260632*G^10*x^25-424534*G^10*x^24-1498915*G^10*x^23+781935*G^10*x^22+848815*G^10*x^21-757779*G^10*x^20-150645*G^10*x^19+280951*G^10*x^18-14894*G^10*x^17-40722*G^10*x^16+3421*G^10*x^15+1991*G^10*x^14+121*G^10*x^13-30*G^9*x^39+530*G^9*x^38-3920*G^9*x^37+16720*G^9*x^36-49290*G^9*x^35+113700*G^9*x^34-194090*G^9*x^33+144480*G^9*x^32+293350*G^9*x^31-1052080*G^9*x^30+1480260*G^9*x^29-1144730*G^9*x^28+448850*G^9*x^27+265980*G^9*x^26-925070*G^9*x^25+763210*G^9*x^24+364310*G^9*x^23-818980*G^9*x^22+23060*G^9*x^21+488240*G^9*x^20-160620*G^9*x^19-111460*G^9*x^18+55360*G^9*x^17+6410*G^9*x^16-3960*G^9*x^15-230*G^9*x^14-10*G^9*x^13+27*G^8*x^39-342*G^8*x^38+2151*G^8*x^37-8244*G^8*x^36+21186*G^8*x^35-38934*G^8*x^34+48861*G^8*x^33-612*G^8*x^32-219987*G^8*x^31+631269*G^8*x^30-866889*G^8*x^29+495225*G^8*x^28+158022*G^8*x^27-423810*G^8*x^26+423270*G^8*x^25-384435*G^8*x^24-36405*G^8*x^23+510903*G^8*x^22-317043*G^8*x^21-128025*G^8*x^20+162099*G^8*x^19-6615*G^8*x^18-26748*G^8*x^17+4239*G^8*x^16+810*G^8*x^15+18*G^8*x^14-8*G^7*x^39+152*G^7*x^38-1064*G^7*x^37+4032*G^7*x^36-8888*G^7*x^35+10176*G^7*x^34+1968*G^7*x^33-40744*G^7*x^32+136336*G^7*x^31-313120*G^7*x^30+459224*G^7*x^29-334736*G^7*x^28-23008*G^7*x^27+232168*G^7*x^26-242312*G^7*x^25+288640*G^7*x^24-191968*G^7*x^23-137768*G^7*x^22+254304*G^7*x^21-62152*G^7*x^20-60288*G^7*x^19+28424*G^7*x^18+2808*G^7*x^17-2144*G^7*x^16-32*G^7*x^15+7*G^6*x^39-70*G^6*x^38+420*G^6*x^37-1589*G^6*x^36+3486*G^6*x^35-2772*G^6*x^34-6685*G^6*x^33+26159*G^6*x^32-54999*G^6*x^31+108409*G^6*x^30-178710*G^6*x^29+173712*G^6*x^28-57190*G^6*x^27-14567*G^6*x^26-5782*G^6*x^25-62391*G^6*x^24+164073*G^6*x^23-80311*G^6*x^22-63077*G^6*x^21+61600*G^6*x^20-637*G^6*x^19-11438*G^6*x^18+2100*G^6*x^17+252*G^6*x^16+18*G^5*x^38-132*G^5*x^37+492*G^5*x^36-1026*G^5*x^35+516*G^5*x^34+3648*G^5*x^33-11520*G^5*x^32+16968*G^5*x^31-20172*G^5*x^30+35550*G^5*x^29-52002*G^5*x^28+33528*G^5*x^27-13614*G^5*x^26+42258*G^5*x^25-43038*G^5*x^24-30156*G^5*x^23+63240*G^5*x^22-16386*G^5*x^21-16236*G^5*x^20+7848*G^5*x^19+888*G^5*x^18-672*G^5*x^17+15*G^4*x^37-80*G^4*x^36+150*G^4*x^35+175*G^4*x^34-1715*G^4*x^33+4555*G^4*x^32-6405*G^4*x^31+4995*G^4*x^30-3420*G^4*x^29+4100*G^4*x^28+110*G^4*x^27-5000*G^4*x^26-9345*G^4*x^25+27380*G^4*x^24-13790*G^4*x^23-11340*G^4*x^22+11735*G^4*x^21-350*G^4*x^20-2310*G^4*x^19+505*G^4*x^18+35*G^4*x^17+4*G^3*x^36+4*G^3*x^35-136*G^3*x^34+640*G^3*x^33-1608*G^3*x^32+2456*G^3*x^31-2604*G^3*x^30+2692*G^3*x^29-2252*G^3*x^28-1936*G^3*x^27+8024*G^3*x^26-6424*G^3*x^25-3072*G^3*x^24+7056*G^3*x^23-2136*G^3*x^22-1572*G^3*x^21+848*G^3*x^20+92*G^3*x^19-76*G^3*x^18+18*G^2*x^34-105*G^2*x^33+306*G^2*x^32-567*G^2*x^31+732*G^2*x^30-882*G^2*x^29+1173*G^2*x^28-801*G^2*x^27-960*G^2*x^26+2328*G^2*x^25-1314*G^2*x^24-483*G^2*x^23+750*G^2*x^22-123*G^2*x^21-105*G^2*x^20+33*G^2*x^19+4*G*x^33-14*G*x^32+20*G*x^31-20*G*x^30+10*G*x^29+14*G*x^28+14*G*x^27-106*G*x^26+110*G*x^25-2*G*x^24-50*G*x^23+18*G*x^22+4*G*x^21-2*G*x^20+3*x^31-14*x^30+30*x^29-45*x^28+50*x^27-23*x^26-25*x^25+40*x^24-15*x^23-5*x^22+5*x^21-x^20)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
